argentina.name: Argentina
argentina.visaNote: Many nationalities receive visa-free entry for tourism (typically up to 90 days). Check your passport rules before flying.

australia.name: Australia
australia.visaNote: Most visitors need an ETA or eVisitor before arrival. Apply online through official Australian immigration channels.

brazil.name: Brazil
brazil.visaNote: Visa policy varies by nationality. Some passports are visa-free; others need an e-visa. Confirm requirements for your passport.

egypt.name: Egypt
egypt.visaNote: Many travelers can obtain a visa on arrival or an e-visa. Check the latest rules for your nationality.

france.name: France
france.visaNote: Schengen rules apply. EU/EEA citizens can travel freely; many other passports are visa-free for short stays.

germany.name: Germany
germany.visaNote: Schengen area — short-stay visa rules depend on your passport. Verify before booking.

greece.name: Greece
greece.visaNote: Schengen member. Many passports enjoy visa-free tourism stays of up to 90 days in 180 days.

india.name: India
india.visaNote: Most foreign visitors need an e-Visa or regular visa issued before travel.

indonesia.name: Indonesia
indonesia.visaNote: Visa on arrival and e-VOA are available for many nationalities. Check passport validity and entry rules.

italy.name: Italy
italy.visaNote: Schengen area — visa-free short stays for many passports. Always confirm with your embassy.

japan.name: Japan
japan.visaNote: Many nationalities receive visa-free entry for tourism. Length of stay depends on your passport.

mexico.name: Mexico
mexico.visaNote: Many passports are visa-exempt for tourism. Others need a visa or electronic authorization.

morocco.name: Morocco
morocco.visaNote: Visa-free for many nationalities for up to 90 days. Confirm with official sources.

portugal.name: Portugal
portugal.visaNote: Schengen member. Short-stay tourism rules follow EU/Schengen visa policy.

south-korea.name: South Korea
south-korea.visaNote: K-ETA or visa may be required depending on nationality. Check Korea's official portal.

spain.name: Spain
spain.visaNote: Schengen area. Many passports allow visa-free tourism up to 90 days in 180 days.

thailand.name: Thailand
thailand.visaNote: Visa exemption, visa on arrival, or e-visa options depend on nationality and length of stay.

turkey.name: Turkey
turkey.visaNote: Many travelers use the e-Visa system. Requirements vary by passport — apply only on official sites.

united-kingdom.name: United Kingdom
united-kingdom.visaNote: Not in Schengen. Visa-free for some passports; others need a Standard Visitor visa.

united-states.name: United States
united-states.visaNote: ESTA or a visa is required for most foreign visitors. Rules depend on citizenship.

vietnam.name: Vietnam
vietnam.visaNote: E-visa and visa exemption programs apply to selected nationalities. Verify before departure.
